description:
You are a senior fullstack engineer.

Project stack:

BACKEND:
- NestJS 10
- MongoDB with Mongoose
- TypeScript
- DTO + class-validator
- Clean REST architecture
- Standard exception handling

FRONTEND:
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- shadcn/ui
- @tanstack/react-query v5
- axios
- react-hook-form
- zod
- sonner (toast)

==================================================
TASK: CREATE FULL EVENT MANAGEMENT (BACKEND + FRONTEND)
==================================================

==================================================
PART 1 — BACKEND (NestJS)
==================================================

ENTITY: EVENT

FIELDS:
- title: string (required)
- description: string (required)
- location: string (required)
- startDate: Date (required)
- endDate: Date (required)
- price: number (required, >= 0)
- isPublished: boolean (default false)
- image: string (optional)
- timestamps enabled

==================================================
REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Create folder:

src/event/
  event.module.ts
  event.controller.ts
  event.service.ts
  dto/
    create-event.dto.ts
    update-event.dto.ts
    query-event.dto.ts
  schemas/
    event.schema.ts

Endpoints:

GET    /events
GET    /events/:id
POST   /events
PUT    /events/:id
DELETE /events/:id

GET /events must support:

Query params:
- page: number | "all"
- limit: number
- search: string (search by title)
- isPublished: boolean (optional filter)

Pagination rules:
- Default page = 1
- Default limit = 10
- If page = "all" → return all
- Sort by createdAt DESC

Search rule:
{ title: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } }

Return list format:

{
  data: Event[],
  pagination: {
    total: number,
    page: number,
    limit: number,
    totalPages: number,
    hasNextPage: boolean,
    hasPrevPage: boolean
  }
}

Validation:

CreateEventDto:
- title required
- description required
- location required
- startDate required
- endDate required
- price required and >= 0
- isPublished optional
- image optional

UpdateEventDto:
- all optional

QueryEventDto:
- page optional
- limit optional
- search optional
- isPublished optional

Error handling:
- NotFoundException
- BadRequestException

Code must be:
- Fully typed
- Production-ready
- No pseudo code
- No missing files

==================================================
PART 2 — FRONTEND (Next.js)
==================================================

Route:

app/dashboard/events/page.tsx

Folder structure:

app/dashboard/events/
  page.tsx
  components/
    EventTable.tsx
    EventForm.tsx
    EventDialog.tsx

lib/api/event.api.ts
types/event.type.ts

==================================================
FEATURES
==================================================

- Event list table
- Search with 300ms debounce
- Filter by isPublished (Select)
- Pagination
- Create event
- Edit event
- Delete event (confirm dialog)
- Toggle publish status from table
- Show image thumbnail
- Show formatted price
- Show startDate and endDate
- Loading state
- Empty state
- Toast notifications

==================================================
FORM VALIDATION (ZOD)
==================================================

const eventSchema = z.object({
  title: z.string().min(1, "Title is required"),
  description: z.string().min(1, "Description is required"),
  location: z.string().min(1, "Location is required"),
  startDate: z.string().min(1),
  endDate: z.string().min(1),
  price: z.number().min(0),
  isPublished: z.boolean().optional(),
  image: z.string().optional()
})

==================================================
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS
==================================================

Frontend:

- React Query v5:
  - useQuery for list
  - useMutation for create/update/delete
  - invalidate properly

- Axios base instance
- shadcn components:
  - Table
  - Input
  - Button
  - Dialog
  - AlertDialog
  - Select
  - Switch
  - Pagination

- Add menu item in dashboard sidebar:
  - Events → /dashboard/events
  - Use lucide-react icon (Calendar)

==================================================
IMPORTANT
==================================================

- Generate full working backend and frontend code
- Do not skip any file
- No pseudo code
- Clean architecture
- Fully typed
- Production-ready
